text:
いつもいつも悪いわね。
今さらこんなこと言うのズルいけど
ロックベアって凶暴なんでしょう？

もちろん、あなたなら仕留められると
思うからこそ頼んでるんだけど。
他の人に頼めるわけないじゃない！

無理なら無理で
仕方ないと思ってるから。
ほ

Here you are again! Thanks so much.
Rockbears are pretty ferocious, huh?
I probably should've mentioned that sooner...

But that's why I came to you in the first place!
I'm confident you can handle it, but I'd feel
bad asking anybody else.

Don't worry, though, I understand you can't
just force the impossible.
At least, I kind of understand.
